title: The Gingerbread Man

segments.text: An old woman baked a gingerbread man.
When she opened the oven, he jumped out and ran away.
Run, run, as fast as you can!
You can't catch me, I'm the gingerbread man!
A fox said, I will carry you across.
In the middle of the river, the fox ate him.
And that was the end of the gingerbread man.

transcript: An old woman baked a gingerbread man. When she opened the oven, he jumped out and ran away. Run, run, as fast as you can! You can't catch me, I'm the gingerbread man! He ran past a cow. He ran past a horse. They all chased him. He came to a river. A fox said, I will carry you across. The gingerbread man climbed on. In the middle of the river, the fox ate him. And that was the end of the gingerbread man.
